title: High-frequency spinal cord stimulation at 10 kHz for widespread pain: a retrospective survey of outcomes from combined cervical and thoracic electrode placements
study_question: Does HF10-SCS at 10 kHz provide long-term pain relief for widespread neuropathic/nociplastic pain syndromes?
population_assessed: 45 patients with widespread upper and lower body neuropathic/nociplastic pain syndromes including fibromyalgia
outcome_measures: Numerical rating scale, Roland Morris Disability Questionnaire, employment status, opioid medication use
inclusion_criteria: Widespread neuropathic/nociplastic pain affecting both upper and lower body; candidates for combined cervical and thoracic SCS
answer_to_study_question: HF10-SCS at 10 kHz provides significant long-term pain relief with staggered cervical-thoracic leads, improved disability, employment, and reduced opioid use.
